0.text: Segmental and subsegmental peribronchial thickening with prominent luminal narrowing in both lungs

1.text: Mosaic attenuation pattern in both lungs

2.text: Reticulonodular density increases in both lung apices

3.text: Paraseptal emphysema in both lung apices

4.text: Several subcentimeter nonspecific pulmonary nodules in both lungs
